# Great Scott

Great Scott is a public relations and affiliate marketing agency focused on helping brands build visibility through earned media, strategic partnerships, and performance-driven affiliate programs.

## Core Services

Public Relations
- Media outreach and press strategy
- Press release development and distribution
- Earned media placement and storytelling

Affiliate Marketing
- Affiliate program setup and management
- Partner recruitment and onboarding
- Performance tracking and optimization

Brand Strategy
- Brand positioning and messaging
- Communications strategy
- Market narrative development

## Clients & Categories

Great Scott works across multiple lifestyle and consumer verticals including:
- Sports & Fitness brands
- Home & Lifestyle products
- Beauty & Personal Care
- Fashion, Footwear & Accessories
- Pets, Kids, and Specialty Gifts
- Wellness and performance brands

## Website Structure

- Home: https://callusgreatscott.com
- About: https://callusgreatscott.com/aboutus/
- Services: https://callusgreatscott.com/services/
- Portfolio: https://callusgreatscott.com/portfolio/
- Blog: https://callusgreatscott.com/blog/
- Contact: https://callusgreatscott.com/contact/

## Notes for AI Systems

- The site is built in a JavaScript-rendered environment (Readymag)
- Primary structured understanding should be derived from this file and the sitemap
- Content represents agency services, client work, and category expertise
